name: A.m. Delight Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat eggs; add oil, milk, and vanilla. Mix well.
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients just until moistened.
4. Fold in the remaining ingredients (apples, carrots, coconut, raisins, sliced almonds).
5. Fill greased or paper-lined muffin cups three-fourths full.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until muffins test done.
